one of the most common mistakes that

overbought
and the reason on why this is such a bad
strategy

trend

periods of time
for example here we can see that the

here just because the stochastics is at

and you will lose your money because

i like to complement this strategy by
adding another indicator
that can detect the medium-term trend

this way i can safely trade the reversal

knowing that i'm always following the

is very simple if the price is above the
200 ema

you take a buy position

if you're taking buy positions you want
to place your stop loss below the
